overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a vibrant post-apocalyptic landscape during golden hour. The character walks through fields of red blight vegetation past massive ancient satellite dishes toward a Tenakth settlement, with dramatic sunlight creating lens flares.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail through red blight vegetation with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks steadily along a path beside a stream, heading toward massive ancient satellite structures in the distance

entered.detail: vibrant red corrupted plants covering the ground in all directions
narrow waterway running parallel to the dirt path
large vertical metal fin from ancient aircraft wreckage visible against the mountains
massive parabolic radio telescope dish overgrown with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a riverside path surrounded by vivid red blight vegetation. A stream flows on the left while in the distance, the fin of a crashed aircraft and a massive satellite dish are visible against a mountainous backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field between massive satellite dishes

events.description: sun emerges directly ahead creating intense lens flare and warm backlighting between the satellite dishes

agents.ego_description: continues walking forward as the sun emerges directly ahead, passing between two massive ancient satellite dishes

entered.detail: second massive parabolic dish structure appearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As Aloy walks between the massive satellite dishes, the sun emerges directly ahead creating dramatic lens flare and backlighting. The river disappears from view behind while the second dish comes into view on the right, framing the path between the two ancient structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching Tenakth settlement with elevated platforms

events.description: ancient industrial ruins transition to tribal settlement architecture with elevated huts

agents.ego_description: walks past the satellite dishes and approaches a Tenakth village with elevated thatched-roof platforms on the right

entered.detail: elevated wooden structures with thatched roofs built on stilts among the trees

segments.scene_description: Moving past the satellite dishes, the scene transitions to reveal a Tenakth settlement with distinctive elevated platforms and thatched roofs on the right. The first satellite dish fades into the distance on the left as the village structures become more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with golden monument and villagers

events.description: Tenakth villagers in yellow clothing become visible standing in the red vegetation field ahead

agents.ego_description: approaches a golden arch monument and encounters Tenakth villagers standing in the field ahead

notable_agents.action: two villagers in yellow clothing stand idly among the red vegetation, facing the approaching character

entered.detail: large golden circular arch structure standing prominently in the field
NPC characters wearing yellow clothing standing in the red vegetation

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Aloy approaches a striking golden arch monument while the Tenakth settlement looms closer on the right. Two villagers in yellow clothing become visible standing in the red vegetation ahead, and the last satellite dish fades from view behind as the character nears the settlement outskirts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate riverside path through a corridor of ancient technology toward a vibrant tribal settlement. It begins with Aloy walking along a stream surrounded by vivid red blight vegetation, with a crashed aircraft fin and a massive satellite dish visible against a mountainous backdrop. As she advances between the towering satellite dishes, the sun emerges directly ahead to create dramatic lens flares and backlighting, causing the river to disappear from view. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the structures to reveal a Tenakth settlement with elevated platforms and thatched roofs appearing on the right. Finally, the path leads toward a striking golden arch monument and villagers in yellow clothing, while the last satellite dish fades into the distance behind the character.
